brands.name: Softroc
brands.notes: Mobile decorative rubber-and-stone surfacing franchise (pool decks, patios, garage floors) founded 2019, franchising since 2021; now part of Stellar Service Brands. Small, fast-growing emerging system (~30 units) with a low-overhead, home-based model.

riskFlags.title: Very young, small system
riskFlags.detail: Franchising only since 2021 with roughly 30 units per Entrepreneur's 2026 directory listing; limited operating history and limited franchisee performance track record.

riskFlags.title: Parent company is Stellar Service Brands
riskFlags.detail: Softroc is operated under multi-brand platform Stellar Service Brands (Restoration 1, bluefrog Plumbing + Drain, The Driveway Company); shared-services platform ownership can change support economics over time.

liquidCapitalMin.note: Franchisor FAQ cites $50,000 liquid / $150,000 net worth; Entrepreneur directory lists $100,000 liquid / $250,000 net worth. Franchisor figure used as headline. https://softrocfranchise.com/faq/

totalInvestmentMin.note: Franchisor states initial investment range $94,825-$167,600. https://softrocfranchise.com/investment/

totalInvestmentMax.note: Entrepreneur lists a similar range of $85,072-$170,547. https://softrocfranchise.com/investment/

franchiseFee.note: Current franchisor-stated fee; older directory listings (Entrepreneur) cite $49,900. https://softrocfranchise.com/investment/

royaltyPercent.source: Softroc franchise site FAQ (FDD Item 6 summary)
royaltyPercent.note: 5.5% of gross sales, collected monthly. https://softrocfranchise.com/faq/

adFundPercent.source: Softroc franchise site FAQ (FDD Item 6 summary)
adFundPercent.note: 1% brand marketing fee; franchisees are additionally asked to spend 2% of gross sales on local advertising. https://softrocfranchise.com/faq/

yearFranchising.note: A 2021 Softroc FDD is on file at The FDD Exchange. https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/softroc/335226216

employeesRequired.note: Listed as 0 required employees to run; owner-operator mobile model. https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/softroc/335226216

veteranDiscount.source: Entrepreneur Franchise Directory / Softroc franchise site
veteranDiscount.note: $7,000 off the first franchise fee for honorably discharged veterans. https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/softroc/335226216

exclusiveTerritories.note: Entrepreneur lists exclusive territories as not available. https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/softroc/335226216

value: Initial marketing package included in startup capital

brands.name: Southern Steer Butcher
brands.notes: Neighborhood butcher shop / fresh market concept founded 2013 in Clearwater, FL; franchising since 2020 with roughly 8 franchised + 1 company-owned stores, nearly all in Florida. Brick-and-mortar food retail with comparatively high build-out costs for an emerging brand.

riskFlags.title: Very small, geographically concentrated system
riskFlags.detail: Only about 8 franchised locations plus 1 company-owned as of 2025-2026, with the open units concentrated in Florida (Clearwater, Sarasota, Ocoee, St. Petersburg, Jacksonville). The model is largely unproven outside its home market.

riskFlags.title: High build-out cost relative to system maturity
riskFlags.detail: Total investment can reach roughly $797,000 per the franchisor's own Item 7 summary - a significant commitment for a system with under 10 open units. Reported investment ranges vary across sources ($376K-$797K franchisor; $429K-$723K and $487K-$628K in directories).

statesOpen.note: Home market; all current operating locations are in Florida.
Franchise registration on file and accepting candidates per IFPG.
Franchise registration on file and accepting candidates per IFPG.
Franchise registration on file and accepting candidates per IFPG.
Franchise registration on file and accepting candidates per IFPG.

liquidCapitalMin.note: IFPG and PeerSense both cite $150,000 liquid / $500,000 net worth; one directory (Vetted Biz) cites $200,000 liquid. https://www.ifpg.org/top-franchises/southern-steer-butcher

totalInvestmentMin.note: Franchisor-published Item 7 range $376,223-$797,343; directory summaries cite narrower ranges ($429K-$723K, $487K-$628K). https://southernsteerfranchise.com/research/how-much-does-it-cost/

franchiseFee.note: Single-unit fee; multi-unit packages: 2 units $109,000, 3 units $151,000, 4 units $193,000 (IFPG). https://southernsteerfranchise.com/research/how-much-does-it-cost/

royaltyPercent.note: Tiered/de-escalating 6%/5%/4% royalty structure per IFPG; some directory summaries cite up to 8%, so confirm in current FDD. https://www.ifpg.org/top-franchises/southern-steer-butcher

adFundPercent.note: Brand fund of 1% of weekly gross revenues per IFPG; some summaries cite 2%. https://www.ifpg.org/top-franchises/southern-steer-butcher

totalUnits.note: 8 franchised + 1 company-owned per IFPG; 2025-FDD-based summaries (PeerSense) showed 6 franchised + 1 company-owned. https://www.ifpg.org/top-franchises/southern-steer-butcher

trainingWeeks.note: Two-week initial training program (~97 hours: 10 classroom, 87 on-the-job per PeerSense); no prior butchery experience required. https://southernsteerfranchise.com/research/how-much-does-it-cost/

item19Available.note: Item 19 discloses location-level results for select Florida franchise stores (e.g., Sarasota gross profit $882,616 / net income $314,391 at 15.5% margin; Ocoee net income $142,108 at 8%); no system-wide AUV is disclosed, so avgUnitRevenue is omitted. https://www.ifpg.org/top-franchises/southern-steer-butcher

multiUnitAvailable.note: Published multi-unit fee schedule (2-4 units); multi-unit agreements already executed per PeerSense. https://www.ifpg.org/top-franchises/southern-steer-butcher

exclusiveTerritories.note: Franchisees receive a designated 'Protected Area'; franchisor retains rights for non-traditional locations. https://peersense.com/franchise/southern-steer-butcher

brands.name: Sparkle Squad
brands.notes: Home-based residential window cleaning / exterior services franchise launched in 2022 (franchising since 2023) under Happinest Brands (Lawn Doctor, Mosquito Hunters, ecomaids), built on Canadian operator Elite Window Cleaning (est. 2012). Rapid territory sales but very short US operating history.

riskFlags.title: Very new US system - most growth is sold territories, not mature units
riskFlags.detail: Franchising only since 2023; Entrepreneur lists ~90 units while 1851 Franchise reported 56 owners after two years and ~17 territories signed in the first six months of 2024. Few locations have multi-year operating history in the US.

riskFlags.title: Backed by established multi-brand parent Happinest Brands
riskFlags.detail: Sparkle Squad is an emerging brand under Happinest Brands (850+ locations across Lawn Doctor, Mosquito Hunters, ecomaids), which mitigates some new-brand support risk; concept derives from Canadian brand Elite Window Cleaning operating since 2012.

riskFlags.title: Above-average royalty rate
riskFlags.detail: Entrepreneur lists a 10% royalty, at the high end for home-services franchises; weigh against the relatively low investment and included support.

nationwide.note: Entrepreneur lists Sparkle Squad as seeking new franchisees throughout the United States.

liquidCapitalMin.note: Entrepreneur cites $60,000 liquid / $200,000 net worth; some directories cite $50,000 liquid / $150,000 net worth. https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/sparkle-squad/335226763

totalInvestmentMin.note: Franchisor and Entrepreneur both cite $161,392-$185,167 all-in. https://sparklesquadfranchise.com/investment/

royaltyPercent.note: Ad contribution is a flat $96/week rather than a percentage, so adFundPercent is omitted. https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/sparkle-squad/335226763

totalUnits.note: Largely sold territories in a system franchising since 2023; 1851 Franchise reported 56 owners as of its two-year growth recap. https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/sparkle-squad/335226763

yearFounded.note: US brand founding; derived from Canadian Elite Window Cleaning, operating since 2012. https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/sparkle-squad/335226763

yearFranchising.note: A 2023 Sparkle Squad FDD is on file at The FDD Exchange; first US franchisees signed in 2024. https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/sparkle-squad/335226763

veteranDiscount.note: 10% off franchise fee for qualified veterans (franchisor also extends it to minorities and first responders). https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/sparkle-squad/335226763

canRunFromHome.note: Mobile, home-based model with limited overhead. https://sparklesquadfranchise.com/

isGrowing.note: 17 territories signed in first six months of 2024; ~50-90 territories sold within two years of launch. https://1851franchise.com/sparkle-squad/sparkle-squad-expands-rapidly-with-17-franchise-territories-signed-in-just-six-months-2726552

brands.name: Special Strong
brands.notes: Adaptive/inclusive fitness training franchise for people with mental, physical and cognitive challenges; founded 2016 in the Dallas area by Daniel Stein, franchising since ~2020. Low-cost, service-based model but a very small system with no Item 19 earnings disclosure.

riskFlags.title: Very small system with conflicting unit counts
riskFlags.detail: Entrepreneur's 2026 listing shows 18 units while a 2025 FDD-based summary (PeerSense) shows 10 total (9 franchised, 1 company-owned). Either way the system remains small and concentrated (primarily Texas and Arizona), with limited validation data.

riskFlags.title: No Item 19 financial performance representation
riskFlags.detail: The current FDD does not include an Item 19 earnings claim; the ~$133,000 average-revenue figure circulating in franchisor marketing is not FDD-validated, so prospective buyers cannot rely on disclosed unit economics.

totalInvestmentMin.note: Range $85,000-$102,750 including franchise fee, grand opening and operating capital; matches franchisor site. https://peersense.com/franchise/special-strong

royaltyPercent.note: Royalty ranges 7-8% of monthly gross revenue with a $450/month minimum; 7% is the lower bound. https://peersense.com/franchise/special-strong

adFundPercent.note: 2% of gross sales to the marketing fund (PeerSense cites a 2-8% possible range; 2% is the standard lower bound). https://peersense.com/franchise/special-strong

totalUnits.note: Entrepreneur 2026 lists 18 units (+157% growth); 2025 FDD-based PeerSense summary shows 10 total (9 franchised, 1 company-owned). Treat as 10-18. https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/special-strong/336247

yearFounded.note: Founded by Daniel Stein in the Dallas-Fort Worth area. https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/special-strong/336247

trainingWeeks.note: Two-week in-person program (100+ hours) in the Dallas-Fort Worth area, including accredited personal-training and proprietary adaptive-trainer certification. https://peersense.com/franchise/special-strong

item19Available.note: No Item 19 financial performance representation in the current FDD; avgUnitRevenue therefore omitted. https://peersense.com/franchise/special-strong

brands.name: Spray Foam Genie
brands.notes: Spray-foam insulation franchise launched in 2022 by Phoenix Franchise Brands from a 2007-founded Birmingham, AL predecessor (APC Spray Foam). Sold ~38 franchises quickly, but the brand and its parent face serious, well-documented franchisee complaints and alleged failures.

riskFlags.title: Parent Phoenix Franchise Brands faces mounting fraud allegations
riskFlags.detail: Franchise Times reported franchisees across Phoenix Franchise Brands concepts (Fetch Pet Care, Furry Land, Spray Foam Genie, etc.) allege the franchisor misrepresented model viability and uses a predatory fee structure; a Fetch franchisee association complaint to the Michigan attorney general alleges a 'scheme to defraud franchisees' under the Michigan Franchise Investment Law.

riskFlags.title: Franchisee complaints allege deceptive earnings claims and heavy losses
riskFlags.detail: Unhappy Franchisee (Nov 2024) published Spray Foam Genie franchisee allegations of false/deceptive earnings claims, understated capital needs, inflated equipment costs, and targeting of E-2 visa investors; franchisees report individual losses of $500K-$1M+ and claim roughly half of the ~60 area developers who signed in 2022-23 have closed or transferred under duress. Dozens of complaints have been submitted to the FTC. These are allegations, not adjudicated findings.

riskFlags.title: Item 19 based on a single affiliate location; almost no franchisee track record
riskFlags.detail: The 2024 FDD's Item 19 reflects only the company's original Birmingham, AL affiliate operation; only one franchisee had operated for a full year as of Dec 31, 2023. The brand also did not rank on Entrepreneur's 2025 Franchise 500.

riskFlags.title: Franchise fee scales steeply with territory population
riskFlags.detail: Initial franchise fee runs $65,000-$190,000 depending on market size, plus $20,000 per additional 500,000 population above 2.5M; local digital advertising minimums of $2,500/month per vehicle add to ongoing costs.

totalInvestmentMin.note: Range $323,540-$545,240; franchisee complaints allege real capital needs are understated. https://www.franchisechatter.com/2025/05/29/spray-foam-genie-franchise-review-2025-costs-fees-news-average-revenues-and-or-profits/

franchiseFee.note: Base/minimum fee; scales to $190,000 by territory population, plus $20,000 per additional 500,000 population above 2.5M. https://www.franchisechatter.com/2025/05/29/spray-foam-genie-franchise-review-2025-costs-fees-news-average-revenues-and-or-profits/

royaltyPercent.note: 6% of weekly gross revenue with escalating weekly minimums ($175 Yr1, $249 Yr2, $415 Yr3, $524 Yr4+). https://www.franchisechatter.com/2025/05/29/spray-foam-genie-franchise-review-2025-costs-fees-news-average-revenues-and-or-profits/

adFundPercent.note: 1% brand development fund (weekly minimums $50 Yr1, $100 Yr2+); separate local digital ad minimum of $2,500/month per vehicle. https://www.franchisechatter.com/2025/05/29/spray-foam-genie-franchise-review-2025-costs-fees-news-average-revenues-and-or-profits/

avgUnitRevenue.note: 2023 gross revenue of the single affiliate-owned Birmingham, AL location (2 trucks + 2 single rigs) disclosed in Item 19 of the 2024 FDD - NOT a franchisee average; only one franchisee had operated a full year as of Dec 2023. https://www.franchisechatter.com/2025/05/29/spray-foam-genie-franchise-review-2025-costs-fees-news-average-revenues-and-or-profits/

totalUnits.note: 38 franchised, 0 company-owned as of the 2024 FDD (year-end 2023). Franchisee complaints (Unhappy Franchisee, Nov 2024) allege roughly half of 2022-23 signees have since closed or transferred. https://www.franchisepayback.com/franchise/spray-foam-genie

yearFounded.note: Franchise brand created 2022; predecessor company APC Spray Foam founded 2007 in Birmingham, AL and rebranded Spray Foam Genie in Feb 2022. https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/spray-foam-genie/335226539

yearFranchising.note: Began franchising late 2022 under Phoenix Franchise Brands. https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/spray-foam-genie/335226539

trainingWeeks.note: Two-week intensive program at headquarters (~70 hours per Entrepreneur: 51 on-the-job, 19 classroom). https://www.vettedbiz.com/franchises/spray-foam-genie

employeesRequired.note: Listed as 0 required; complainants allege the real labor requirement is materially understated. https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/spray-foam-genie/335226539

item19Available.note: Item 19 present but covers only the single affiliate-owned Birmingham location. https://www.franchisechatter.com/2025/05/29/spray-foam-genie-franchise-review-2025-costs-fees-news-average-revenues-and-or-profits/

absenteeOwnership.note: Entrepreneur lists absentee ownership as allowed, but franchisee complaints specifically allege the semi-absentee/passive pitch misrepresents the hours actually required. https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/spray-foam-genie/335226539

canRunPartTime.note: Directory listing; contradicted by franchisee complaints about understated labor/hours. https://www.entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/spray-foam-genie/335226539
